summary: Tested booking management UI fixes: 1) Scheduled tab no longer has 'Book a photographer' CTA (correctly removed), 2) BookingCard manage button (3-dot menu) loads properly for Pending status bookings, 3) SessionActionDrawer opens with all 4 options (Invite Crew, Post to Feed, Modify Time, Cancel Session), 4) The Lineup tab renders correctly with 'Start a Lineup' CTA and empty state.

minor.issue: Console shows 404 errors for bookings fetch - may be intermittent or related to session state

critical_code_review_comments: ScheduledTab.js correctly removed 'Book a photographer' CTA - booking creation now only in The Lineup tab
BookingCard.js line 99 fix working - 'Pending' status now included in manage button condition
SessionActionDrawer.js properly displays all 4 action buttons with correct data-testid attributes
LineupTab.js renders correctly with 'Start a Lineup' CTA and 'No Active Lineups' empty state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking management UI fixes verified: 1) Scheduled tab shows only existing bookings with manage button (no booking creation CTA), 2) The Lineup tab is the correct place for booking creation with 'Start a Lineup' and 'New Lineup' buttons, 3) SessionActionDrawer has all 4 options working (Invite Crew, Post to Feed, Modify Time, Cancel Session). Test user has 1 pending booking at Test Beach for 4/6/2026.

scheduled_tab_no_booking_cta.notes: 'Book a photographer' and 'Browse Photographers' CTAs correctly removed from Scheduled tab

scheduled_tab_booking_cards.notes: Booking card displayed with Pending status and manage button (3-dot menu)

manage_button_for_pending_status.notes: Manage button visible for Pending status bookings (BookingCard.js line 99 fix working)

session_action_drawer_options.notes: All 4 options present: Invite Crew, Post to Feed, Modify Time, Cancel Session

lineup_tab_start_lineup_cta.notes: 'Start a Lineup' CTA and 'New Lineup' button found in The Lineup tab

lineup_tab_empty_state.notes: 'No Active Lineups' empty state displayed correctly with 'Start Your First Lineup' button
